title: ranunculus gregarius var. carpetanus
intro: Ranunculus gregarius var. carpetanus, also known as Meadow Buttercup, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Ranunculus gregarius var. carpetanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
